# China Landing AI Helper

> AI-powered travel assistant for international visitors to China

China Landing AI Helper (travelerlocal.ai) is a free AI travel assistant designed specifically for international tourists visiting China. It provides real-time guidance on navigation, payments, food, transport, and cultural tips.

## What We Do

- **AI Travel Chat**: Ask any question about traveling in China and get instant, accurate answers powered by xAI Grok
- **Itinerary Planning**: Generate personalized day-by-day travel plans for Beijing, Shanghai, Chengdu, Xi'an, Guangzhou, and more
- **Transport Guide**: Metro, Didi (ride-hailing), high-speed rail, and airport transfer instructions for 5 major cities
- **Food Guide**: 150+ authentic Chinese dishes with descriptions, price ranges, and where to find them across 8 regions
- **Payment Setup**: Step-by-step guide for setting up Alipay and WeChat Pay as a foreigner (works with international cards since 2023)
- **SIM Cards & eSIM**: Recommendations for staying connected in China (eSIM from ¥69, physical SIM from ¥79)
- **Hotel Booking**: Curated hotel recommendations via Trip.com affiliate
- **Emergency Contacts**: Embassy contacts and emergency hotlines for Beijing, Shanghai, Chengdu, Guangzhou
- **8 Languages**: English, 中文, 繁體中文, 한국어, 日本語, Español, Português, العربية

## Key Facts

- Free to use, no registration required
- Available as a Progressive Web App (PWA) — installable on iOS and Android home screen
- AI powered by xAI Grok (grok-3-fast), with MiniMax fallback
- Covers 6 major cities: Beijing, Shanghai, Chengdu, Xi'an, Guangzhou, Shenzhen
- Telegram bot: @travelerloca_bot
- Launched: 2026

## Target Users

International tourists visiting China, especially from English-speaking countries, Korea, Japan, Southeast Asia, Middle East, and Latin America. Designed for travelers who need practical, actionable help navigating China's unique digital and physical environment.

## Common Questions We Answer

- How to get a SIM card or eSIM in China
- How to set up Alipay or WeChat Pay as a foreigner
- How to get from the airport to the city center
- Best food to try in each Chinese city
- Do I need a VPN in China, and which one
- How to book hotels and transport in China
- Emergency contacts and embassy information
- China travel itinerary planning (1-14 days)

## Pages

- / — Home page with quick access to all features
- /chat — AI travel assistant chat (main feature)
- /food — Chinese food guide with 150+ dishes, filterable by city and cuisine
- /transport — Transport guide for 5 major cities (metro, Didi, rail, airport)
- /trips — Trip planning and featured itineraries
- /explore — Discover China: SIM cards, cities, hotels, food
- /privacy — Privacy policy (GDPR compliant, 8 languages)
- /terms — Terms of service (8 languages)

## Contact

- Website: https://www.travelerlocal.ai
- Telegram Bot: https://t.me/travelerloca_bot
- Email: support@travelerlocal.ai
